summary.contentAssessment: The source is a blood-bank / transfusion-medicine educational dashboard with dense inline teaching content and several interactive learning simulators.
notes: The root page contains a large structured knowledge base of transfusion topics, HDFN, component therapy, donor screening, and related pearls.
The simulator components provide the main interactive teaching workflows.
No standalone local educational image assets were found; only a branding SVG exists.

algorithms.reason: Interactive reaction decision tree with branching diagnostic logic.
Risk scoring and decision logic for hemolytic disease of the fetus and newborn.
Component ordering calculator with rule-based dosing logic.

tutorials.reason: Primary educational dashboard with a large curated transfusion-medicine topic set.
Interactive antibody panel interpretation teaching module.

dependencies.role: Next.js app shell and metadata only.
Socket.IO / Next.js server wrapper; not content.
Realtime infrastructure dependency for the app shell.

recommendation: Migrate the dashboard content in src/app/page.tsx and the simulator components first, since that is where the teaching material lives. Treat the rest of the project as framework and runtime scaffolding. Do not expect a separate lecture deck or standalone image library in this repository.
